mapper.select:
SELECT H.HOSPITAL_ID AS hospitalId, H.NAME AS hospitalName, NVL(M.NICKNAME,NVL(H.OWNER_NAME, '병원장 미등록'))AS ownerName, M.EMAIL AS ownerEmail, H.STATUS AS hospitalStatus, HUR.REQUEST_ID AS requestId, HUR.REQUEST_TYPE AS requestType, HUR.STATUS AS requestStatus FROM HOSPITAL H LEFT JOIN APP_MEMBER M ON M.MEMBER_ID = H.OWNER_ID LEFT JOIN HOSPITAL_UPDATE_REQUEST HUR ON HUR.HOSPITAL_ID = H.HOSPITAL_ID AND HUR.STATUS = 'PENDING'
AND (UPPER(H.NAME) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR UPPER(NVL(M.NICKNAME, NVL(H.OWNER_NAME, '') ) ) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' )
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM HOSPITAL_ANIMAL HA WHERE HA.HOSPITAL_ID = H.HOSPITAL_ID AND HA.ANIMAL_ID = #{animalType} )
AND HUR.REQUEST_TYPE = #{requestType}
ORDER BY
H.NAME
NVL( M.NICKNAME, NVL(H.OWNER_NAME, '병원장 미등록'))
CASE H.STATUS WHEN 'OPEN' THEN 1 WHEN 'TEMP_CLOSED' THEN 2 WHEN 'CLOSED' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END
CASE HUR.REQUEST_TYPE WHEN 'UPDATE' THEN 1 WHEN 'TEMP_CLOSE' THEN 2 WHEN 'CLOSE' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END
H.HOSPITAL_ID
DESC
ASC
, H.HOSPITAL_ID ASC
